title: hieracium glaucum subsp. leucophaeum
intro: Hieracium glaucum subsp. leucophaeum, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusible in hot water, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
